long_description:
[OBS]-Daemonset Rollout Stuck [DAL] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL:                    https://github.ibm.com/cloud-iaas-observability/osprey-sre-runbooks/blob/main/Runbooks/Osprey-Monitoring/SecondarySOPs/Rollout_Stuck_Issues.md
TIP Situation:                      Observed Kubernetes Daemonset Rollout Stuck issue in osprey-infrastructure-health-alerts
TIP Short Description:              Kubernetes Daemonset Rollout Stuck sos-nessus-agent osprey-us-south
TIP Console:                        toc
TIP Self Healing:                   false
TIP Self Healing Timeout Seconds:   3600
TIP CRN:                            crn:v1:bluemix:public:is-observability-logging:us-south::osprey-us-south:microservice:sos-nessus-agent

Event Generated:

Severity:            sev-3
Metric:
    sum by (kube_cluster_name, namespace, daemonset ) (kube_daemonset_status_number_ready / kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled * 100 < 100 or kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled - kube_daemonset_status_current_number_scheduled > 0) = 99.10
Segment:
    daemonset = 'sos-nessus-agent' and kube_cluster_name = 'osprey-us-south' and namespace = 'ibm-services-system'

Time:                12/07/2025 08:33 AM UTC
State:               Triggered

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:           Prometheus
Name:           [OBS]-Daemonset Rollout Stuck [DAL]
Description:    Kubernetes Daemonset Rollout Stuck sos-nessus-agent osprey-us-south
Team:           is-observability-logging
Scope:          
Alert When:     sum by (kube_cluster_name, namespace, daemonset ) (kube_daemonset_status_number_ready / kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled * 100 < 100 or kube_daemonset_status_desired_number_scheduled - kube_daemonset_status_current_number_scheduled > 0)
